channel.title: David's Daily Bread
channel.description: A twice-daily briefing on technology, markets, and science, baked fresh every morning and evening.

item.title: Evening edition — Tuesday, July 7, 2026: Chip rout deepens as DeepSeek's silicon push and Samsung jolt Wall Street
item.description: Lead story: Chip rout deepens as DeepSeek's silicon push and Samsung jolt Wall Street. Plus the evening's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Morning edition — Tuesday, July 7, 2026: Chip stocks slide as Samsung's profit surge fails to satisfy
item.description: Lead story: Chip stocks slide as Samsung's profit surge fails to satisfy. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.
